index.html.title: Multi-Tool Suite - Free Online PDF, Image & ID Tools
index.html.description: Access 14+ professional, private, and free web tools for PDF merging, image compression, background removal, bio data creation, and more. No server uploads.
index.html.keywords: online tools, free pdf tools, image editor online, privacy focused utilities, web tools hub

faqs.q: Are these tools really free to use?
faqs.a: Yes, all tools in the Multi-Tool Suite are 100% free with no hidden costs, subscriptions, or limits.

faqs.q: Is my data safe and private?
faqs.a: Absolutely. All processing happens locally in your browser. Your files and data are never uploaded to our servers, ensuring total privacy.

faqs.q: Do I need to create an account?
faqs.a: No registration or login is required. You can start using any tool immediately without providing any personal information.

faqs.q: What kind of tools are available?
faqs.a: We offer a wide range of tools including PDF mergers, compressors, image resizers, AI background removers, passport photo makers, and professional bio data generators.

bio-data-maker.html.title: Bio Data Maker - Create Professional Resumes Online Free
bio-data-maker.html.description: Create beautiful, professional bio data and resumes in seconds. Choose from multiple modern templates, customize colors, and download as PDF instantly. No signup required.
bio-data-maker.html.keywords: bio data maker, resume builder, free resume creator, online cv maker, professional bio data generator

faqs.q: Is this bio data maker free?
faqs.a: Yes, it is 100% free with no hidden charges or premium plans.

faqs.q: Do I need to create an account?
faqs.a: No, you can start creating and downloading your resume without any login.

image-compressor.html.title: Image Compressor - Reduce JPG, PNG & WebP Size Free
image-compressor.html.description: Compress images online without losing quality. Reduce file size of JPG, PNG, and WebP images. Set target KB size and bulk download instantly.
image-compressor.html.keywords: image compressor, reduce image size, photo compressor online, compress jpg, compress png, image size reducer

faqs.q: How many images can I compress at once?
faqs.a: You can upload and compress up to 20 images in a single batch.

faqs.q: Does compression affect photo quality?
faqs.a: Our algorithm minimizes file size while maintaining the highest possible visual clarity.

image-resize.html.title: Image Resizer - High Quality Photo Dimension Changer
image-resize.html.description: Resize your images to any dimension with high-quality scaling. Change width and height in pixels or percentage. Fast, free, and works entirely in your browser.
image-resize.html.keywords: image resizer, resize photo online, change image dimensions, scale image, free photo resizer, high quality image resizing

faqs.q: Will my images look blurry after resizing?
faqs.a: No, we use high-quality image smoothing algorithms to keep your photos sharp.

faqs.q: Can I resize by percentage?
faqs.a: Yes, you can easily switch to percentage mode to scale your images proportionally.

passport-photo-crop.html.title: Passport Photo Crop Tool - Standard 35x45mm ID Maker
passport-photo-crop.html.description: Crop and format your photo to standard passport or ID size (35x45mm). Generate a printable A4 sheet with multiple photos instantly.
passport-photo-crop.html.keywords: passport photo crop, id photo maker, passport size photo generator, 35x45mm photo tool, print passport photos

faqs.q: What is the standard passport photo size?
faqs.a: The most common size is 35mm x 45mm (3.5cm x 4.5cm), which this tool uses by default.

faqs.q: Can I download a printable sheet?
faqs.a: Yes, you can generate an A4 sheet containing multiple copies of your passport photo.

passport-size-with-name.html.title: Passport Photo with Name & Date - Free Online Generator
passport-size-with-name.html.description: Create professional passport size photos with custom name and date printed at the bottom. Download single HD image or generate an A4 printable sheet.
passport-size-with-name.html.keywords: passport photo with name, passport photo with date, id photo generator with text, name on passport photo

faqs.q: Is it mandatory to add a name and date?
faqs.a: Many competitive exams and ID applications require name and date on the photo. Our tool makes this easy.

faqs.q: How many photos fit on one A4 sheet?
faqs.a: You can fit up to 35 passport-sized photos on a single A4 sheet using this tool.

jpg-to-pdf.html.title: JPG to PDF Converter - Merge Images to PDF Online
jpg-to-pdf.html.description: Convert JPG, PNG, and WebP images to PDF documents. Rearrange pages, adjust quality, and merge multiple images into one file easily.
jpg-to-pdf.html.keywords: jpg to pdf, convert image to pdf, images to pdf converter, merge images to pdf, photo to pdf free

faqs.q: Can I convert PNG images to PDF too?
faqs.a: Yes, our converter supports JPG, PNG, WebP, and other common image formats.

faqs.q: Is there a limit to how many images I can merge?
faqs.a: You can upload and merge as many images as you need into a single PDF document.

pdf-to-jpg.html.title: PDF to JPG Converter - Extract PDF Pages as Images
pdf-to-jpg.html.description: Convert PDF pages into high-quality JPG or PNG images. Extract specific pages or the entire document as a ZIP archive instantly.
pdf-to-jpg.html.keywords: pdf to jpg, convert pdf to image, extract images from pdf, pdf to png converter, pdf page to image

faqs.q: Can I extract specific pages from a PDF?
faqs.a: Yes, you can choose to convert individual pages or the entire document into images.

faqs.q: What is the quality of the resulting images?
faqs.a: The images are extracted at high DPI to ensure that the text and graphics remain clear.

image-merge.html.title: Image Merger - Combine Multiple Photos Together Online
image-merge.html.description: Merge multiple images into a single picture. Combine photos vertically or horizontally, adjust spacing, and set background colors easily.
image-merge.html.keywords: image merger, combine photos, join images online, stitch photos together, photo joiner free

faqs.q: Can I join images side-by-side?
faqs.a: Yes, you can choose between horizontal or vertical merging modes.

faqs.q: Is there a limit on the number of photos?
faqs.a: You can merge up to 10-15 images depending on your browser's memory.

pdf-merge.html.title: PDF Merger - Combine Multiple PDF Files Online Free
pdf-merge.html.description: Merge multiple PDF documents into a single file. Drag and drop to rearrange order, fast processing, and secure local merging.
pdf-merge.html.keywords: pdf merger, combine pdf files, join pdf documents, merge pdf online free, secure pdf joiner

faqs.q: Is merging PDF files secure?
faqs.a: Yes, the merging happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your computer.

faqs.q: Can I change the order of files after uploading?
faqs.a: Absolutely. You can drag and drop the file list to set the exact order you want.

ocr-tool.html.title: OCR Tool - Free Online Image to Text Converter AI
ocr-tool.html.description: Free online Optical Character Recognition (OCR) tool. Extract text from images, scanned documents, and photos accurately using AI technology.
ocr-tool.html.keywords: ocr tool, extract text from image, image to text converter, online ocr, photo to text ai

faqs.q: How accurate is the text extraction?
faqs.a: We use Tesseract AI, which is highly accurate for most printed text and scanned documents.

faqs.q: Which languages are supported?
faqs.a: Our OCR tool supports English, Hindi, Spanish, and over 10 other common languages.

pdf-compressor.html.title: PDF Compressor - Reduce PDF File Size Online Free
pdf-compressor.html.description: Compress PDF files online for free. Reduce the file size of your PDF documents while maintaining high quality and readability.
pdf-compressor.html.keywords: pdf compressor, reduce pdf size, shrink pdf file, compress pdf online, low size pdf maker

faqs.q: Will my PDF quality decrease?
faqs.a: Our tool uses smart compression to reduce size while keeping text and images sharp.

faqs.q: Is there a limit on file size?
faqs.a: You can compress large PDF files up to 100MB directly in your browser.

copy-pdf-text.html.title: Copy Text from PDF - Extract Content Easily Online
copy-pdf-text.html.description: Easily extract and copy text from PDF files. Upload your document and get clean, selectable text instantly. Works entirely in your browser.
copy-pdf-text.html.keywords: extract text from pdf, copy pdf text, pdf to text converter, read text from pdf, pdf content extractor

faqs.q: Can I copy text from a scanned PDF?
faqs.a: Yes, our tool uses OCR to detect text even in non-selectable scanned documents.

faqs.q: Is the extracted text editable?
faqs.a: Yes, the text is extracted as plain text which you can edit or paste anywhere.

add-white-bg.html.title: Add White Background to Images Online Free
add-white-bg.html.description: Quickly add a solid white background to transparent PNGs or images. Perfect for professional product photos and e-commerce listings.
add-white-bg.html.keywords: add white background, white background generator, product photo background, photo edit white bg

faqs.q: Why do I need a white background?
faqs.a: Most e-commerce platforms like Amazon require product photos to have a pure white background.

faqs.q: Does it work with bulk images?
faqs.a: Yes, you can upload multiple transparent images and add white backgrounds to all of them at once.

background-remover.html.title: AI Background Remover - Remove Image BG for Free
background-remover.html.description: Remove backgrounds from images instantly using AI. Make image backgrounds transparent with our high-quality, free online eraser tool.
background-remover.html.keywords: background remover, remove background from image, transparent background, bg eraser, ai bg removal

faqs.q: Is this tool completely free?
faqs.a: Yes, our background remover is 100% free with no watermarks.

faqs.q: Does it handle complex hair details?
faqs.a: Our AI model is optimized to handle fine details like hair and complex edges accurately.
